channel.title: La Señal — Español por input comprensible
channel.description: A serialized sci-fi political drama in Colombian and Venezuelan Spanish, engineered as a 365-day comprehensible-input curriculum. A Bogotá astronomer detects a signal that is not from Earth — and the fight over what it means begins. Starts slow and scaffolded, ends at full native speed. Voice references: OpenSLR SLR72/SLR75 (CC-BY-SA 4.0, © Google). Private listening feed.
channel.itunes:author: La Señal

item.title: Episodio 0 — Prueba de nivel
item.description: A 12-minute listening diagnostic. Five passages, each faster and denser than the last, each followed by three spoken questions. Score yourself with the sheet in the show notes; your result sets Day 1. Instructions in English; everything else in Spanish.
